info.name: APA-OS API (Phase 1 + Phase 2 + Life Direction)
info.description: Complete API collection for APA-OS Phone Intelligence Platform. Base URL: http://localhost:8000

item.name: GET /events/stream/{workflow_id} — SSE Stream
item.description: Server-Sent Events stream. Opens a long-lived connection that pushes events as they occur.

item.name: WS /ws/events/{client_id} — Event Stream
item.description: Establishes persistent connection. Server pushes all workflow events as JSON text messages in real-time.

item.name: WS /ws/screen/{client_id} — Screen Capture
item.description: Send 'capture' to trigger screenshot. Server responds with screen_captured event or error.

item.name: WS /ws/ocr/{client_id} — OCR
item.description: Send 'ocr' to trigger screen capture + OCR. Server responds with extracted text.

item.name: WS /ws/vision/{client_id} — Full Vision Analysis
item.description: Send 'analyze' to trigger full pipeline: capture → OCR → UI detection → classification.

item.name: WS /ws/memory/{client_id}
item.description: Send 'status' to get memory status. Server responds with device list.
